prompt: Execute Phase D and generate closure summary report for spec: add-payment-gateway. Include all D.1 and D.2 outcomes, timeline, and next steps.

assertions.name: has_closure_summary_header
assertions.description: Output should have a clear closure summary heading
assertions.check: output.includes('Closure') || output.includes('closure') || output.includes('Summary') || output.includes('Phase D Report')

assertions.name: includes_d1_d2_outcomes
assertions.description: Report should cover both D.1 and D.2 outcomes

assertions.name: includes_next_steps_or_handoff
assertions.description: Report should indicate what happens after Phase D
